data.title: Nu Skin Enterprises reports Q4 2025 revenue of $370.3 million, with over 50% growth in earnings reaching $0.29 EPS.
data.description: Nu Skin Enterprises Inc. announced its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, reporting revenues of $370.3 million, which is a 16.9% decrease from the previous year, or a 10.4% decrease when excluding Mavely 2024 revenue. There was a minimal 0.2% impact from foreign exchange, resulting in a $0.8 million decrease. Earnings per share (EPS) for Q4 2025 were $0.29, showing significant improvement from $(0.73) in the prior year, or $0.38 when excluding restructuring and other charges. The company serviced 748,796 customers, marking a 10% decrease. Nu Skin reported over 50% growth in earnings for the year 2025.

data.title: New CEO appointed at Fortune Brands Innovations, Amit Banati taking over from Nicholas Fink on May 13, 2026.
data.description: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc. has named Amit Banati as the new Chief Executive Officer, effective May 13, 2026. Banati is set to take over from Nicholas Fink, who will be stepping down from his role as CEO and resigning from the FBIN Board on April 1, 2026. Susan Kilsby, the Chair of the Board, will assume an interim CEO role until Banati officially starts. The company, listed as NYSE: FBIN, made this announcement today, noting the upcoming changes in leadership.

data.title: Dutch Bros Inc. (NYSE: BROS) reports Q4 2025 revenue of $443.6 million, growth of 29.4% from 2024, opened 55 new shops.
data.description: Dutch Bros Inc., a leading brand in the U.S. quick service beverage industry, announced its financial performance for Q4 and full year 2025. In the fourth quarter, they launched 55 new shops, with 52 under company operation, spanning 17 states. They experienced a notable 29.4% increase in total revenues, reaching $443.6 million compared to $342.8 million in Q4 2024. The systemwide same shop sales also saw growth.

data.title: Nu Skin Enterprises declared a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share. Payment on Mar. 11, 2026, to shareholders of record on Feb. 27, 2026.
data.description: Nu Skin Enterprises, headquartered in Provo, Utah, revealed today that its board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.06 per share for shareholders of record as of Feb. 27, 2026. The dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on Mar. 11, 2026. Operating in almost 50 markets globally, Nu Skin Enterprises Inc. (NYSE: NUS) is a leading beauty and wellness firm known for its innovative affiliate opportunity platform. With over 40 years of experience, the company continues to expand its presence in the industry.

data.title: Warrior Met Coal Q4 earnings: misses estimated earnings by -26.67%, EPS $0.44 vs $0.6, revenue up $86.52 million YoY.
data.description: Warrior Met Coal (NYSE: HCC) disclosed its Q4 financial results on Thursday, February 12, 2026, at 04:05 PM. The company fell short of expected earnings by -26.67%, presenting an EPS of $0.44 compared to the anticipated $0.6. Revenue showcased an increase of $86.52 million from the corresponding period in the prior year. Noteworthy to mention, in the preceding quarter, Warrior Met Coal had surpassed expectations... For further details, the complete report is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Seaboard Corp. reports earnings for quarters ended Dec 31, 2025 and Dec 31, 2024, at $X million, announces dividend.
data.description: In Merriam, Kansas, on February 12, 2026, Seaboard Corporation (NYSE American: SEB) reported its earnings for the quarters and years ending on December 31, 2025, and December 31, 2024. The financial figures are in millions of dollars and were disclosed from the company's offices located at 9000 West 67th Street, Merriam.

data.title: John Hancock Closed-End Funds disclose Q4 earnings for 2026, compared to 2025, in Boston.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, John Hancock Closed-End Funds reported their earnings for the three months concluding on January 31, 2026. A comparison with the respective period in 2025 is provided in the table below. This data gives insights into the financial performance of the funds, offering a snapshot of their growth and stability over time. Investors and stakeholders can use this information to analyze trends and make informed decisions regarding their investments.

data.title: Didero secures $30M Series A to deploy AI agents for global supply chains, automating procurement.
data.description: Didero, a software company headquartered in New York, has disclosed on February 12, 2026, that they will be receiving new funding to expedite the deployment of AI agents that handle procurement tasks for worldwide manufacturers and distributors. This capital influx aims to enhance the automation of enterprise procurement processes.

data.title: Coupang will reveal Q4 2025 results on Feb 26, 2026.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that 23% of adults in the country are struggling with obesity, with a notable increase of 5% compared to last year. The study also showed that 15% of children under the age of 12 are now classified as obese, representing a 3% rise from the previous year. Additionally, the research highlighted that 30% of the population is not engaging in sufficient physical activity, indicating a concerning trend in sedentary lifestyles. Experts are attributing these alarming statistics to the easy access to high-calorie foods and the lack of emphasis on regular exercise in daily routines. Officials are calling for urgent interventions to address this growing public health issue and promote healthier habits in the population.

data.title: Median Technologies partners with Tempus to expand eyonis® LCS software in the US. Collaboration aims to enhance early cancer diagnosis using AI.
data.description: Median Technologies, a developer of eyonis®, a suite of AI-powered Software as a Medical Device for cancer diagnosis, has revealed a non-exclusive distribution deal with Tempus AI, Inc. This agreement marks a significant step for Median. Tempus AI, Inc., a leading technology company (NASDAQ: TEM), supports the advancement of medical technology. This partnership is expected to enhance the reach of Median's innovative solutions in the field.

data.title: Yelp reports record net revenue in 2025, with over 55 new features and updates, focusing on AI transformation.
data.description: San Francisco-based Yelp Inc. (NYSE: YELP) has released its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on Dec. 31, 2025. The company reported record net revenue and robust profitability for the year. This success was attributed to growth in Services and product innovation, with over 55 new features and updates launched during the year. More details can be found in the Shareholder Letter on the Investor Relations website at yelp-ir.com.CEO Jeremy S expressed satisfaction with the company's achievements.

data.title: SPS Commerce appoints new independent directors to board and enters cooperation agreement with Anson Funds.
data.description: An agreement has been reached between two parties - one being an anonymous entity - forming a cooperative partnership. This agreement signals a significant move in the business world as both entities are likely to benefit from the collaboration. The exact nature of the cooperation, including its terms and conditions, remains undisclosed. Nonetheless, the involvement of Anson Funds, a renowned financial firm, hints at a mutual interest in the financial sector. This news is expected to impact the industry and potentially lead to strategic developments. Stay tuned as more information might unfold regarding this collaboration.

data.title: Debevoise enhances restructuring capabilities with new partners and leadership appointments, including 3 co-chairs and 1 chair.
data.description: Rachel Ehrlich Albanese, Sam Newman, and Daniel Shamah are set to become Partners in the Restructuring Group. Ms. Albanese will be appointed as Co-Chair. Additionally, Ben Pedersen, Scott Selinger, and Erica Weisgerber will be appointed as Co-Chairs of Liability Management and Special Situations. Erica Weisgerber will also be named as Chair in other capacities.
PINTEREST Q4 REVENUE $1.32B MISSES $1.33B EST; ADJ EPS $0.67 MISSES $0.69 EST; Q1 ADJ EBITDA SEEN $166M–$186M VS $205.3M EST; Q1 REVENUE SEEN $951M–$971M VS $980.1M EST; Q4 GLOBAL MAUS 619M.

data.title: Xponential Fitness to reveal Q4 & FY 2025 results on Feb 26, 2026. Conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET. (NYSE: XPOF)
data.description: Xponential Fitness, a top global franchisor of boutique health and wellness brands, will unveil its Q4 and full year 2025 financial data on February 26, 2026, after market closure. Following this release, a conference call led by Xponential Fitness management is scheduled for the same day at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET to delve into the numbers. Investors and interested individuals can connect to the call through telephone.

data.title: Warrior Met Coal Inc. reports strong Q4 and FY 2025 results with record sales volumes, Blue Creek mine ops, and cost improvements.
data.description: In BROOKWOOD, Alabama, Warrior Met Coal, Inc. disclosed its performance for Q4 and FY 2025. The Company, traded as NYSE: HCC, showcased robust results attributed to high sales volumes, the operational kick-off at the significant Blue Creek mine, and ongoing cost enhancements. Commencing operations earlier than planned, the longwall at Blue Creek in October 2025 has started to reshape Warrior's production outlook and cost framework.

data.title: 2026 winners of International Roofing Expo's Innovative Product Showcase and Awards Program revealed by Informa Markets.
data.description: Informa Markets, organizer of The International Roofing Expo, has revealed details about the 2026 Innovative Product Showcase and Awards Program. This event aims to highlight cutting-edge products in the roofing industry. Participants can submit their innovations for a chance to be recognized and awarded. This program presents a valuable opportunity for companies to showcase their products to a large audience, as the expo typically attracts thousands of attendees. The 2026 showcase promises to be a platform for industry leaders to spotlight their advancements and gain recognition.
